title: Origins: Skybloom
description: Put on a spectacle by lighting up the horizon in a dazzling display.
body:
**Requires the [Origins Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) and [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui) for Minecraft 1.20.1**

**Note: You have to add the datapack manually to your world if you are intending to add it with the modrinth app.**

**Origin Impact: 3**

*Not born, but bloomed. In the distant outer end, a chorus flower attempted to mimic life, and from it, a skybloom emerged. A creeper infused with mysterious ender essence, capable of launching itself like a firework and exploding midair in a dazzling display.*

# Powers

<details>
<summary>Bloom Boom</summary>

- You dissapear and propel yourself forward like a firework. After three seconds, you explode, lighting up the sky in an aurora. This damages nearby entities and nourishes you. Upon reappearing, you're briefly covered in spores, causing you to glow and regenerate.


</details>



<details>
<summary>Overbloom</summary>

- Your essence is unstable. With every hit or bloom, your core overcharges. When it reaches its limits, a delayed burst ruptures from within, harming you and all entities nearby significantly.

</details>




<details>
<summary>Petal Drift</summary>

- Your body drifts gently downward, slowing your fall, but when you crouch, you drop with intent.

</details>


 

<details>
<summary>Delicate</summary>

- Your petals are fragile. Your maximum health is reduced to 7 hearts.

</details>


 

<details>
<summary>Explosive Appetite</summary>

- You cannot digest food the normal way. Only by erupting in bloom do you saturate yourself. You also tire quicker than others.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Hydrophobia</summary>

- You receive damage over time while in contact with water. 

</details>
